EntrantAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
Adapter class for connecting a list of entrants (User objects) to a ListView.

Constructs a new EntrantAdapter.
EntrantEvent - Class in com.example.lottery.model
Model class representing the relationship between an entrant and an event.

Default constructor for Firestore.

Constructs a new EntrantEvent relationship.
EntrantEvent.Status - Enum Class in com.example.lottery.model
Enum representing the possible statuses of an entrant for an event.
EntrantEventAdapter - Class in com.example.lottery
RecyclerView adapter used to display events to entrants on the EntrantMainActivity screen.

Listener interface used to notify when an event item is clicked.

Displays detailed information about a selected event for an entrant.
